exploration_notes: Searched both llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/ and llvm/lib/Transforms/IPO/ for three legacy pass manager patterns: INITIALIZE_PASS macros, legacy base class inheritance (FunctionPass, ModulePass, LoopPass, RegionPass), and create*Pass() factory functions. Found 30 Scalar files and 6 IPO files with legacy PM infrastructure. In Scalar/, most files inherit from FunctionPass, while LICM/LoopUnrollPass/LoopTermFold/LoopStrengthReduce inherit from LoopPass, and StructurizeCFG inherits from RegionPass. In
